ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lorin Lopin appeared by zoom for and with John Vaught (administrator) by zoom.

Mr. Vaught and Mr. Lopin addressed the issues raised in the probate examiner's notes. The Second Amended Petition for Final Distribution, etc., is under submission.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
